/usr/lib/icecc/bin/c++   -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -O2 -g -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/verymeme/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/verymeme/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/memeroute/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/memeroute/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/memeroute/render_shapes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/memeroute/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/memeroute/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/memeroute/router_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeroute.dir/src/programs/memeroute.cpp.o  -o memeroute /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_stacktrace_backtrace.so -pthread
